results.title: Chicago White Sox come out swinging after break with 12-4 rout to regain sole possession of 1st place
results.description: TORONTO — The Chicago White Sox already had scored twice in the second inning Friday against the Toronto Blue Jays. And with Braden Montgomery on third base with two outs, they were looking for more. Chase Meidroth came through with a single to center field. Sam Antonacci followed with a two-run home run to right. How active will the Chicago White Sox be at the trade deadline? 3 questions ...

results.title: Northwoods League: Willmar Stingers regroup for series split
results.description: Stingers best Bismarck 9-6, move to 10-3 in 2nd half

results.title: WATCH: Ohio State big man Josh Ojianwuna can chuck it from deep
results.description: The Ohio State basketball team should have the services of big man Josh Ojianwuna this season. He brings some underrated range from deep. Watch.

results.title: World Cup final closing ceremony takes shape as stars rehearse
results.description: World Cup final closing ceremony takes shape as stars rehearse

results.title: Taylor Ward's 2-run homer in 8th lifts Orioles to 5th straight win, 3-2 over Astros
results.description: Taylor Ward hit a go-ahead, two-run homer in the eighth inning, and the Baltimore Orioles beat the Houston Astros 3-2 to extend their season-best win streak to five games.

results.title: Hayfield Post 33 helps their coach top an old friend
results.description: Short-handed Hayfield Post 33 backed longtime coach Kasey Krekling with an 11-5 playoff win over friend AJ Yusten’s Zumbrota squad, led by Rylan Nelsen’s bat and arm.

results.title: Was DeChambeau’s two-stroke penalty the right call?
results.description: Sportsnet’s Adam Stanley breaks down Bryson DeChambeau’s two-stroke penalty during the second round of The Open Championship and discusses how he expects the American will respond in the final rounds.

results.title: Garrett Mitchell provides heroics in thrilling Brewers 2-1 walk-off victory
results.description: Mitchell reaches base three times and leads the Brewers to their 60th win of the season
